# entityMigrationPolicyClassName

**Instance Property**

The class name of the migration policy for the entity mapping.

## Declaration

```swift
var entityMigrationPolicyClassName: String? { get set }
```

## Discussion

If not specified, the default migration class name is [doc://com.apple.coredata/documentation/CoreData/NSEntityMigrationPolicy]. You can specify a subclass to provide custom behavior.

## Managing Mapping Information

- **name**: The name of the entity mapping.
- **mappingType**: The mapping type for the entity mapping.
- **attributeMappings**: The array of attribute mappings for the entity mapping.
- **relationshipMappings**: The array of relationship mappings for the entity mapping.
- **userInfo**: The user info dictionary for the entity mapping.
